subject: your site might be turning people away
body:
Hi Gloria,

I was looking at the Voelz Body Shop website and noticed it was built with a tool Adobe shut down back in 2020. It doesn't work well on phones -- and that's how most people search for body shops now. For a business that's been trusted since 1980 with I-CAR Gold Class, the site doesn't reflect that.

I can show you exactly what needs to change so people stick around and call. Takes me about 10 minutes.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
